name: Enduro
description: Enduro is an endless driving game where the player races a car against a large number of other racers. The objective is to pass a certain number of cars each day to avoid being eliminated. The game progresses through days, and as the game progresses, the weather changes. Weather conditions can include fog, snow, and nighttime, each impacting visibility and handling. The number of cars that need to be passed increases each day. The landscape is largely barren, with stretches of road varying in slight elevation and turns. The player's car has a top speed, and acceleration is not instantaneous. Collisions with other cars will slow the player down significantly. Time of day affects the visibility. Nighttime is dark and during the winter season, there is snow which affects the handling. Fog greatly reduces visibility.
